comment: End-to-end fixture: synthetic MFT transcript 3 (13 messages, 13 asks). The occurrence-integrity fixture — hammers recurrence counting, the area that broke five runs straight. Two TRUE recurrences with exact counts (host key verification 3x across non-adjacent dates, partner onboarding 2x), phantom-recurrence bait ('Basically...' / 'I mean...' restatements must stay 1x), a forwarded-quote message where identical text appears twice from ONE source (1x, not 2x), a false-recurrence twin pair sharing heavy vocabulary (rotate PGP keys vs rotate SSH keys — different root cause, must stay apart), and two genuine singletons the rescue pass must leave alone. See mft_test_answer_key_3.md.

message_asks.contains: streamlined process to set up a new partner
